title: Invoice totals move to precomputed storage
source: synthetic validation fixture, not GitLab data

R1.evidence:
matched 'stored': "Invoice totals move to precomputed storage
Invoice totals are now precomputed and stored alongside each invoice
record instead of being calculated at read time."

R2.evidence: no trigger language in the note; missing: which processes the change runs through and their volume profile

R3.evidence:
matched 'api': "The public
API returns the stored totals field, and any client that recomputed
totals locally should switch to it."

R5.evidence:
matched 'migration': "A forward-only migration
rewrites existing invoices into the new shape during upgrade."
